etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "self" + "conscious" from Latin "conscientis" (being aware of oneself)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Being aware oneself; experiencing self aware and self-conscious self supported by confidence awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Aware oneself → self aware → contemporary self-conscious self and self-conscious embarrassed that benefits from assurance growth
